title: Support FieldSlicer for function output that returns AbstractField

body:
This PR adds a few barotropic turbulence validation tests on `RegularLatitudeLongitudeGrid`.

It also includes some miscellaneous improvements needed for these simulations:

* Bugfixes for `HorizontallyCurvilinearAnisotropicBiharmonicDiffusivity` (missing functions + closure shenanigans to solve type inference issues)
* Allows `TimeStepWizard` to accept user-defined `cell_advection_timescale` functions
* Implements `auxiliary_fields` computed during `update_state!` for `HydrostaticFreeSurfaceModel`.

Here's where we are at:

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/15271942/116346519-4ab5d000-a79f-11eb-8c7f-91281db0ff56.mp4
title: Barotropic turbulence validation tests on RegularLatitudeLongitudeGrid
